chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 197 of 2024 ( Hamid Ali. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi 06-03-2024 Mr. Khalid Hussain Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>..<<<<<< The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents to demarcate his land and ensure supply of irrigation water to it by submitting report with regard to his ownership over it and a case may also be registered against the private respondents for causing hindrance to supply of irrigation water to his landed property. The direction sought for by the petitioner besides being multiple is involving factual controversy, which could not be resolved by this Court by way of instant petition, in exercise of its Constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, it is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
